executives.name: Diane Jurgens
executives.background: Diane Jurgens is an independent non-executive director. She was formerly the CTO of BHP and has held senior leadership roles at The Walt Disney Company and General Motors.

executives.name: Hugh Johnston
executives.background: Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of The Walt Disney Company. Former Vice Chairman and CFO of PepsiCo.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Jeff Williams
executives.background: Jeff Williams is Apple’s chief operating officer reporting to CEO Tim Cook. He oversees Apple’s entire worldwide operations, as well as customer service and support. He leads Apple’s renowned design team and the software and hardware engineering for Apple Watch. Jeff also drives the company’s health initiatives, pioneering new technologies and advancing medical research to help people better understand and manage their health and fitness.

executives.name: Mary Barra
executives.background: Mary T. Barra has been Chair and CEO of GM since 2016 and 2014, respectively. She has held various leadership positions at GM since 1980, including Executive Vice President, Global Product Development, Purchasing and Supply Chain.

executives.name: Monica Lozano
executives.background: Ms. Lozano is the former President and CEO of College Futures Foundation and former Chairman and CEO of ImpreMedia, LLC.

executives.name: Safra Catz
executives.background: Ms. Catz has been Oracle’s Chief Executive Officer since September 2014. She served as Oracle’s President from January 2004 to September 2014 and as Oracle’s Chief Financial Officer from 2011 to 2014 and 2005 to 2008.

executives.name: Sheryl Sandberg
executives.background: Former Chief Operating Officer of Meta Platforms, Inc.

executives.name: Stephen Burke
executives.background: Former CEO of NBCUniversal and former COO of Comcast Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: James Gorman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gorman is the Executive Chairman of Morgan Stanley. He served as Chief Executive Officer from 2010 through 2023. He joined the Firm in 2006.
